overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious modern penthouse apartment from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a living area with red carpet, a corridor with panoramic city views, and a bar area with extensive bottle collection. The camera moves smoothly through the space, transitioning from dimmer interior areas to spaces with abundant natural light from skylights and floor-to-ceiling windows showing palm trees and the cityscape.

green plants on a shelf above the sofa

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a close-up view of a coffee table holding drinks and magazines in a luxurious apartment living room. The camera moves forward across a red carpet, passing a modern sectional sofa, heading toward a corridor with wooden flooring.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a corridor with wooden flooring, transitioning from the carpeted living room. Large windows on the left reveal palm trees and a cityscape outside, with bright sunlight streaming in. An elevator door is visible on the right wall as the camera progresses toward the bar area.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a sophisticated home bar area featuring a curved counter with bar stools and a fruit plate. The focus shifts to an illuminated wall of bottle shelves displaying various liquor bottles and glassware, with a decorative African mask visible on the wall. The lighting is darker here, creating an intimate atmosphere.

large overhead glass panels showing the sky and palm trees above
orange spherical lamps hanging from the ceiling
vertical wooden slats dividing the space

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a spacious open-concept living area featuring a retro arcade machine and a circular lounge sofa. Large glass skylights overhead reveal palm trees and blue sky, creating a bright, airy atmosphere. Orange pendant lights hang from the ceiling, and wooden slatted partitions provide subtle spatial division in this luxurious penthouse space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a luxurious penthouse, transitioning from an intimate living room into a sun-drenched corridor and finally into a bright, open-concept lounge. It begins with a close-up of a coffee table and drinks, gliding across a red carpet and past a modern sectional sofa toward a wooden corridor. As the camera moves forward, the space opens up with bright sunlight streaming through large windows that reveal palm trees and a cityscape, passing an elevator door on the right. The scene then shifts into a sophisticated, dimly lit bar area featuring a curved counter and an illuminated wall of liquor bottles and glassware. Finally, the camera emerges into a spacious lounge area where the atmosphere becomes airy and bright under large glass skylights, passing a retro arcade machine and orange pendant lights.
